input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.1.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.1.1.2
            TITLE: additional letters or numerals must not show before or after the vehicle number

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.1.1.2: Additional letters or numerals must not show before or after the vehicle number
VE.1.1.2 Additional letters or numerals must not show before or after the vehicle number

final_answer: Additional letters or numerals must not show before or after the vehicle number
